title: Garden In Springtime
description: Green fingers not run in the family? Show mum you care in your own way this Mother’s Day by wrapping up a gift in a colourful alternative to single-use wrapping paper.

images.alt: Garden in Spring. A vibrant, square sheet of Lokta paper with a lush floral design. Small pink, purple, and yellow flowers are nestled among green leaves, covering the entire surface in a dense, meadow-like pattern on a soft green background.

The image shows a round bath bomb wrapped in a sheet of "Garden in Spring" Lokta paper. The wrap is secured at the top with a yellow twine bow, creating a decorative gathered effect. The background shows a soft, botanical-themed bathroom setting.

The image shows a colourful sheet of "Garden in Spring" Lokta paper featuring a hand-painted floral design, wrapped around a spherical bath bomb gift and tied with a yellow twine bow. The background features a tiled background.

The image shows a model with short hair, in a white robe, sitting on the edge of a tiled bath. They are holding a bath bomb wrapped in the "Garden in Spring" Lokta paper gathered on top and tied with yellow twine.
A vibrant close-up shows a sheet. of the "Garden in Spring Lokta paper, featuring a hand-painted floral design with pink, purple, yellow, and blue flowers, and large, lush green leaves.
